steps.t: Ingredients for a hand-crafted card can be found inside of Gondamon and in the wilds just outside the dwarf-waypost. You should collect scrap paper, g…
A good, sturdy crafting table can be found in Gondamon. You should use the crafting table to assemble the glitter, glue, and paper into a nice card fo…
Grímar and Ísólfur are waiting in Gondamon. You should deliver Grímar's cheer-up card to Ísólfur.
